meaning: n.边,轮缘,蓝框vt.镶边,为...装边,沿...边缘滚动vi.形成边状
examples: There is also a new steering wheel with an energy-absorbing rim to cushion the driver's head in the worst impacts.
Insects that land on the rim of the pitcher slide on the liquid and tumble in.
Other items included a Lapita burial urn with modeled birds arranged on the rim as though peering down at the human remains sealed inside.
Apple by far holds the app edge over Android, while RIM remains behind both ecosystems.
Alex ran his hands around the rim of the bath and examined its clawed feet.
